$note: Standalone config for the real-route PR Lighthouse gate (.github/workflows/lighthouse.yml). Separate from the repo-root lighthouserc.json, which is sync-managed by @reddoorla/maintenance and audits /dev/a11y-fixtures. URLs are supplied by the workflow against the Netlify deploy preview.
$thresholds: Measured on the deploy preview (mobile) before committing. a11y is a hard error at 0.9 everywhere (98-100 today; broken markup / heading-order drops it well below, with headroom so noise never false-fails). best-practices is a hard error at 0.9 on `/` and `/portfolio` (96 today) but only a WARN on `/portfolio/<uid>` detail pages: those embed Vimeo, whose player sets Cloudflare third-party cookies (__cf_bm/_cfuvid) that fail the third-party-cookies audit even with dnt=1, and the deploy preview adds a Netlify-only app.netlify.com/cdp cookie (a preview artifact, gone in prod) — together capping detail-page bp at ~0.79 on previews. Gating that hard would false-fail every PR for third-party reasons outside our code. Performance is warn-only everywhere — mobile perf is ~60 until the image pipeline lands (MED-1) and is throttle-flaky. SEO is not asserted at all: previews send x-robots-tag: noindex, failing is-crawlable (~66 on every preview); prod SEO stays on the @reddoorla/maintenance nightly. Tighten perf to error after MED-1; revisit detail-page bp if Vimeo embedding changes.

assertMatrix.comment: Detail pages (/portfolio/<uid>) embed Vimeo → best-practices is warn-only here (unavoidable third-party + preview cookies).
Home and the portfolio listing carry no Vimeo embed → best-practices is a hard gate. Pattern matches `/` and `/portfolio` but NOT `/portfolio/<uid>`.
